title: IMEEA 16.5in/42cm Flat Kebab Skewers Stainless Steel Barbecue Skewers with Wooden Handle Flat Metal BBQ Skewers for Grilling, Set of 6
features: Material: Barbecue Skewers made of high quality stainless steel with a smooth finished, so that food slides smoothly on and off. Easy to clean and reusable.

Flat Blade: The skewer portion is flat and about 0.2inch/0.5cm wide, they're not too wide but just wide enough to hold your food on.These flat blade skewers work much better than the typical round skewers as they tend to hold the food on better and not let them spin around or slide off.

42cm Length: 16.5" stainless steel flat kebab skewers are more than enough to get most grilling jobs done, you can put much more food you like. Great for camping, indoor grilling, outdoor BBQ or any other places you love.

Wooden Handle: The kebab skewers with wooden handles keep your fingers from being burned and make them super easy to place, turn, and remove from the grill without needing tongs. Also comes with 6 food grade silicone tips to protect your skewers and protect you as well when not use them.
Dimension: Total length: 16.5 inch (42cm), Skewer Part: 12.5 inch (32cm), Wooden Handle: 4 inch (10cm),Width:0.5cm. Weight: 0.57lb(260g).
description: Product Description High Quality Stainless Steel The barbecue skewers are made of high quality stainless steel with a smooth finished, easy to clean and reusable. Wooden Handle The kebab skewers with wooden handles can keep your hands from the heat that travels throughout the metal skewer, keep the handle cool and easy to work. Flat Blade Design The bbq skewer portion is flat and about 0.2inch/0.5cm wide, it can stop the food from spinning around or slide off. 16.5in/42cm Long Length Flat Kebab Skewers These flat kebab skewers are suitable for most home grills, camping, indoor grilling, outdoor BBQ or any other places you love.
